query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `content_templates` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `workspace_id` int,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `category` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'promotional' NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'instagram' NOT NULL,
  `caption` text NOT NULL,
  `hashtags` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `tone` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'casual' NOT NULL,
  `is_public` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `usage_count` int DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `tags` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `performance_goals` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `workspace_id` int,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `metric` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `target_value` float NOT NULL,
  `current_value` float DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(64),
  `period` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'monthly' NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(32) DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  `start_date` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `end_date` timestamp NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `saved_audiences` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `workspace_id` int,
  `name` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `platforms` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `age_min` int,
  `age_max` int,
  `genders` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `locations` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `interests` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `behaviors` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `languages` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `estimated_size` int,
  `tags` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
  `created_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

  `genders` json NOT NULL DEFAULT (JSON_ARRAY()),
